title: Add input validation to all API handlers
description: validator.go has validateRequired() but it's never called. Add validation to all POST/PUT handlers for required fields, type checking, and range validation.

title: Split game_system_handlers.go (990 lines) into focused modules
description: Split into: combat_handlers.go, inventory_handlers.go, savegame_handlers.go, skill_handlers.go, achievement_handlers.go. Each file should register its own routes.

title: Split handlers.go (822 lines) into focused modules
description: Split into: scene_handlers.go, npc_handlers.go, agent_handlers.go, shop_handlers.go, item_handlers.go, task_handlers.go, flow_handlers.go, player_handlers.go, export_handlers.go, generator_handlers.go, mcp_rest_handlers.go.

title: Persist conversation memory to database
description: Currently conversation memory is in-memory only (lost on restart). Create a DB-backed memory store using the existing Conversation model. Implement save/load for conversation history, player context, and summaries.

title: Implement real WebSocket game state sync
description: Replace echo-only WebSocket with real game state synchronization. Implement: player position broadcast, NPC state updates, chat messages, combat events, and item pickup notifications.

title: Extract duplicate equipment stat calculation code
description: Equipment stat calculation is duplicated in combat start, combat action, and skill use handlers. Extract into a shared function in inventory.go or a new stats.go.

title: Clean up unused agent stub files
description: Remove agent.go (stub) and service.go (legacy). The real AI integration is in chat.go and memory.go. Update any references.

title: Add pagination to all list endpoints
description: All list endpoints return all records. Add page/page_size query parameters with defaults (page=1, page_size=20, max=100). Return total count in response header.

title: Integrate NPC behavior system into game loop
description: npc_behavior.go defines schedule-based state machine and mood system but it's not used in the actual game. Wire it into NPC interactions so NPCs change behavior based on time, mood, and events.

title: Add GM editor Vue component tests
description: Zero frontend test coverage. Add Vitest + Vue Test Utils. Write tests for: stores (scene, npc, agent, shop), API client, key components (GeneratorPanel, SceneEdit, NPCEdit).

title: Add Docker and docker-compose configuration
description: README mentions Docker but deploy/ is empty. Create Dockerfile for server (multi-stage Go build), docker-compose.yml with server+client+gm, and development compose with hot-reload.

title: Add proper authentication and CORS config
description: GM login returns placeholder token. Implement JWT-based auth for GM endpoints. Make CORS origin configurable instead of wildcard.

title: Add context propagation throughout the stack
description: Some repository methods lack context.Context. Add ctx parameter to all repo methods, pass request context from handlers, add context timeout to DB operations.

title: Fix random source per-call in combat system
description: rand.New(rand.NewSource(time.Now().UnixNano())) is created per combat action. Use a shared source or crypto/rand for better randomness and performance.

title: Add golangci-lint configuration and fix lint issues
description: No linter configured. Add .golangci.yml with appropriate linters (errcheck, govet, staticcheck, unused, ineffassign). Fix all reported issues.

title: Add client-side Phaser 3 game tests
description: No tests for the game client. Add Vitest with jsdom. Test: BootScene texture generation, GameScene state management, CombatManager logic, InventoryManager logic.

title: Add database migration versioning
description: Auto-migrate doesn't version migrations. Add a migrations table and versioned migration files for schema changes. Support up/down migrations.

title: Enhance MCP server with resource and prompt support
description: Current MCP only supports tools. Add resources/list (game state snapshots) and prompts/list (NPC personality templates) for richer AI integration.

title: Add proper structured logging
description: Replace fmt.Println/log.Printf with structured logging (slog or zerolog). Add log levels, request ID tracking, and consistent log format.

title: Add OpenAPI/Swagger documentation
description: No API documentation beyond README. Add swaggo/swag annotations to all handlers. Generate OpenAPI spec. Serve Swagger UI at /swagger/.
